concept: Compassion / An Open Connection of Care
description: The deep wish for all beings to be free from suffering, coupled with the active commitment to help ease that suffering. It is the active expression of empathy.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'lo' (connection), 'thea' (active, tender care), and 'a' (openness). The word's structure suggests 'an open connection of active care.' This defines compassion as a proactive, open-hearted engagement with the suffering of others, moving beyond mere feeling into action.
